sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_geo (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ip_address INET, angle_rad DOUBLE PRECISION);
INSERT INTO test_geo (ip_address, angle_rad) VALUES (inet '192.168.1.1', 0.785398163);
INSERT INTO test_geo (ip_address, angle_rad) VALUES (inet '192.168.1.2', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_geo (ip_address, angle_rad) VALUES (inet '192.168.1.3', -1.5708);
INSERT INTO test_geo (ip_address, angle_rad) VALUES (inet '192.168.1.4', 3.14159);
SELECT degrees(angle_rad), ip_address FROM test_geo WHERE ip_address <<= inet '192.168.1.1';
SELECT degrees(angle_rad), ip_address FROM test_geo WHERE degrees(angle_rad) > 0 AND ip_address <<= inet '192.168.1.0/24';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_geo WHERE degrees(angle_rad) IS NULL OR ip_address <<= inet '192.168.1.0/24';
WITH temp_degrees AS (SELECT degrees(angle_rad) AS deg, ip_address FROM test_geo) SELECT deg, ip_address FROM temp_degrees WHERE deg > 90;
SELECT ip_address, degrees(angle_rad) AS angle_deg FROM test_geo WHERE angle_deg IS NOT NULL ORDER BY angle_deg DESC;
SELECT ip_address FROM test_geo WHERE angle_rad IS NOT NULL AND degrees(angle_rad) <= degrees(0.5) + 10;
CREATE TABLE test_geo_join (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ip_address INET, reference_ip INET);
INSERT INTO test_geo_join (ip_address, reference_ip) VALUES (inet '192.168.1.5', inet '192.168.1.1');
INSERT INTO test_geo_join (ip_address, reference_ip) VALUES (inet '192.168.1.6', inet '192.168.1.2');
SELECT tg.ip_address, degrees(tg.angle_rad) FROM test_geo tg JOIN test_geo_join j ON tg.ip_address <<= j.reference_ip WHERE tg.angle_rad IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_geo WHERE angle_rad > 0 AND angle_rad < 4 AND ip_address IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ip_address HAVING degrees(angle_rad) > 90;
UPDATE test_geo SET angle_rad = degrees(angle_rad) WHERE ip_address <<= inet '192.168.1.2';
DELETE FROM test_geo WHERE degrees(angle_rad) < 0;
ALTER TABLE test_geo ADD COLUMN angle_rad_old DOUBLE PRECISION;
UPDATE test_geo SET angle_rad_old = angle_rad WHERE angle_rad IS NULL;
SELECT AVG(degrees(angle_rad)) OVER (PARTITION BY ip_address) FROM test_geo;
